text.title: Niche Positioning for Solo Dev Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces, plus one valid example, one invalid example, and a forbidden-patterns block. Validator: `scripts/validate-niche-positioning-for-solo-dev.py`.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "niche-positioning-for-solo-dev-2026-Q2", "template_version": "1.1.0", "owner": "founder@faion.net", "decision": "Primary platform: Toptal. Secondary: Contra brand-page.", "context": "Rate band $150-220/hr, lane = 'Stripe integration for Shopify Plus stores', 3 past projects match.", "alternatives": [ "Upwork primary (rejected \u2014 rate-band mismatch)", "Direct outreach only (rejected \u2014 slower ramp)", "Braintrust primary (rejected \u2014 exclusivity clause)" ], "consequences": [ "6-week ramp on Toptal application + screening", "Contra brand-page bi-monthly post cadence", "Refuse non-Shopify Stripe work for 6 months" ], "exit_criteria": [ "< 3 inbound from lane in 6 months => repivot", "Toptal screening fails => switch to Arc + direct outreach" ] }

example.note: Missing required fields and / or schema-violating values. The validator rejects on the first error and lists all violations.

antipattern.description: Artefact missing any required field listed in the JSON Schema.
owner field set to 'team', 'us', 'tbd', or empty string.
evidence array empty for fields the methodology marks non-trivial.
agent self-promotes status to 'approved' without named human reviewer.
Output does not validate against the embedded JSON Schema draft-07.
